subject: Reuniclus, a small green humanoid Pokemon encased in a translucent gelatinous outer body with stubby arm-like appendages
description: A small green figure sits inside a large translucent blob-like outer body, giving it the appearance of a creature within a cell or cocoon. Two smaller arm-like gelatinous appendages extend from the sides of the main body. The overall creature is rendered in soft greens and pinks against a light background. The figure inside is rounded and childlike in proportion. The artwork is bright and whimsical, with the encasing body catching light in a semi-transparent way that emphasizes the biological, cell-like quality of the design.
foreground: Green humanoid figure enclosed in large translucent gelatinous outer body with extending arm-appendages
emotion: calm, contained posture with forward-facing expression
